authority: The engine and executable guards determine admission. V38 is a named forward-forcing constitution over the sealed V37 parent and the complete counted paired-angle lattice.

composition.candidate_basis: At one active residue and one coordinate axis, generate every one of the 24 counted values while preserving all other coordinates.
composition.complete_order_grammar: Execute the Cartesian product of both linear-chain directions and both permutations of phi/psi, producing four independent descents.
composition.convergence: Repeat each complete scan while the admitted V3 total order strictly descends; the finite path space and inclusion of the current path force termination at a fixed point.
composition.reconciliation: Compare the V37 parent and all four fixed points under the unchanged admitted V3 total order and deterministic state-path tie break.

required_derivation_guards.assembled_form_minimality: Generated assembly enumeration proves one bare 24-value axis cannot exhaust the 576 paired states.
required_derivation_guards.dependency_trace_to_the_One_or_an_engine: The V37 parent, binary coordinate count, 24-value angle lattice, paired 576-state product, binary chain boundaries and orientation quartet all trace through existing engine closures.
required_derivation_guards.engine_halt_on_violation: Ernos and Python guards halt on lattice, order, candidate-axis, monotonicity, fixed-point, source, import, configuration or seal drift.
required_derivation_guards.generated_complete_candidate_space: Every coordinate scan contains all 24 axis values; all boundary and coordinate-axis orders are generated as a Cartesian product.
required_derivation_guards.measured_provenance_excluded_from_deriva: Selector input is exactly run_id and sequence; target coordinates and structural metrics remain inaccessible until the V38 seal verifies.
required_derivation_guards.named_shape_uniqueness: Among one-operation +,-,*,/ forms over both complete 24-value axes, only their Cartesian product reaches all 576 paired states.
required_derivation_guards.purpose_matched_real_execution: Required before promotion and recorded separately by the sealed ubiquitin L76 cumulative development benchmark.
